Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 129 

GAP_MONPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Gap Copay Split Network Standard Mail Order — 1 day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using a mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the coverage gap phase of the
